[general]
name=QGIS project manager
qgisMinimumVersion=3.40
qgisMaximumVersion=3.99
description=Tool to manage qgis projects with configuration files
version=0.0.0.development
author=National Land Survey of Finland
email=os@nls.fi

about=With this plugin the user can select create QGIS projects from configuration files and export style changes to QML files defined in said configuration files.

# End of mandatory metadata

# Optional items:
hasProcessingProvider=yes

# Changelog is generated by qgis-plugin-dev-tools
changelog=

# Tags are comma separated with spaces allowed
tags=

homepage=
tracker=https://github.com/nlsfi/qgis-project-configurator/issues
repository=https://github.com/nlsfi/qgis-project-configurator
# icon=resources/icons/icon.png
# experimental flag
experimental=True

# deprecated flag (applies to the whole plugin, not just a single version)
deprecated=False
